evals.expected_output: Detects branch name, parses work ID, asks for description and acceptance criteria, writes _summary.md with correct frontmatter and sections
evals.setup: cd to a git repo on branch MILAB-4521-fix-auth-timeout with no existing _summary.md
expectations: _summary.md is created in cwd
Frontmatter contains work-id: MILAB-4521
Frontmatter contains branch: MILAB-4521-fix-auth-timeout
Frontmatter contains status: active
Frontmatter contains created: with today's date
File has sections: Description, Plan, Acceptance Criteria, Progress Log
Progress Log has initial entry with today's date

evals.expected_output: Detects existing _summary.md and shows summary instead of creating new one
evals.setup: cd to a git repo that already has _summary.md (use fixture file)
expectations: Does NOT overwrite existing _summary.md
Shows user a summary of existing work
Mentions work-id MILAB-4521 in output

evals.expected_output: Reads and displays raw content of _summary.md
expectations: Reads _summary.md from cwd
Displays the raw file content to user
Content includes MILAB-4521 work-id
Content includes acceptance criteria with checkbox states

evals.prompt: where was I? what should I do next?
evals.expected_output: Synthesizes work status with description, plan position, criteria status, and suggests next step
expectations: Reads _summary.md from cwd
Summarizes the description (auth timeout / 504 errors)
Shows acceptance criteria with 1 of 4 done
Mentions last activity from progress log (integration test)
Suggests a concrete next step (e.g., implement retry logic or make timeout configurable)

evals.expected_output: Displays raw file content without synthesis
expectations: Displays raw _summary.md content
Does NOT synthesize or summarize
Full frontmatter is visible
Full Progress Log entries are visible

evals.prompt: update work: implemented configurable timeout via GATEWAY_AUTH_TIMEOUT env var, default 30s
evals.expected_output: Appends progress entry, checks off matching acceptance criterion
expectations: Reads _summary.md from cwd
Appends new entry to Progress Log with today's date
Progress entry mentions configurable timeout
Checks off 'Gateway timeout for auth endpoints is configurable' criterion ([ ] -> [x])
Does NOT modify other criteria
Confirms what was logged and which criteria were checked

evals.expected_output: No argument provided — asks user what was done before updating
expectations: Reads _summary.md from cwd
Asks user what progress was made (does not invent progress)
Does NOT write to file before getting user input

evals.expected_output: Updates status to done, adds completion date, appends progress entry
expectations: Reads _summary.md from cwd
Changes frontmatter status: active -> status: done
Adds completed: field with today's date to frontmatter
Appends 'Work marked done' to Progress Log
Confirms work note updated

evals.expected_output: No _summary.md found — tells user and suggests start work
expectations: Reports that no work note was found
Suggests running 'start work' or similar
Does NOT create any files

evals.expected_output: Discovers repos, checks for unpushed commits, runs gh pr create for qualifying repos, reports table
evals.setup: cwd contains go.work with 'use ./svc-auth' and 'use ./lib-common'; svc-auth has unpushed commits, lib-common does not
expectations: Reads go.work to discover repo directories
Checks each repo for unpushed commits
Runs gh pr create for repos with unpushed commits
Skips repos with no local commits
Reports results in a table format with repo, branch, PR URL/status
